reviews.review_description: Junk...delayed firing ruins the object ofbthe game. Don't buy.

I really enjoyed it. It is similar to "Smash Hit" but it is not as good as "Smash Hit" in term of being challenging.

Perhaps, if you bring throwing ball or something related instead of stick style thing then it will be more fun to target and challenging. Right now, it is easy to hit targets as you move on.
I think this game is very fun,love it

You'll like magic smash quite a bit. I would much prefer shooting balls rather than light beams, but the game is still really good. Good sound track and environment. Thanks for making it. Hoping for more VR games like this in the future.
If you want to copy a game idea, steal from the best. Great work and I recommend the game
Good game but please please add Controller support! It is too hard to keep the arms up all the time

developer_response.body: Hello! we have update a new version, in this version we add game-pad support,please update the game ,thank you!
